task: I found a small wallet at school and I’m trying to make sure I handle it the right way. What should I do first before I touch anything inside it?

turns.agent_response:
The first thing to do is **turn it in to a teacher or the school office without opening it**.

If you need to move it, pick it up carefully and keep it closed. That way, the owner’s money, ID, or other items stay safe and untouched until staff can help return it.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that’s what I’d do. Keep it closed and take it to the office or a teacher first. Don’t open it at all.
